Transition animations, framebuffer management, DMA operations, and screenshot protocol for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[default](default/README.md)**: Transition animations and related functions for the Pebble firmware compositor, including dot, launcher, modal, peek, port hole, round flip, shutter, and slide transitions.
- **[legacy](legacy/README.md)**: Slide and modal transition animations for app compositing in the Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[compositor.c](compositor.c.md)**: Manages framebuffer composition and rendering transitions for applications and modals in the Pebble firmware.
- **[compositor.h](compositor.h.md)**: Manages screen display, app framebuffers, and modal windows with transition animations for Pebble.
- **[compositor_display.c](compositor_display.c.md)**: Manages display updates by flushing framebuffer lines and handling update completion callbacks.
- **[compositor_display.h](compositor_display.h.md)**: Handles copying framebuffer content to the display driver and checks update progress.
- **[compositor_dma.c](compositor_dma.c.md)**: DMA-based compositor initialization and execution with semaphore synchronization for Pebble firmware.
- **[compositor_dma.h](compositor_dma.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and running DMA operations in a compositor.
- **[compositor_private.h](compositor_private.h.md)**: Functions for rendering app and modal windows to the system framebuffer and filling pixels in animations.
- **[compositor_transitions.c](compositor_transitions.c.md)**: Implements compositor transitions for app-to-app graphics, including color replacement and framebuffer operations.
- **[compositor_transitions.h](compositor_transitions.h.md)**: Header file for compositor transition animations, including functions for animation scaling and frame drawing.
- **[screenshot_pp.c](screenshot_pp.c.md)**: Implements a screenshot protocol for capturing and sending framebuffer data over a communication session.
- **[screenshot_pp.h](screenshot_pp.h.md)**: Callback function for handling screenshot request messages in a communication session.
